margin_product.reason: Margin/Swap/TRAM-like surfaces need taxonomy, eligibility, collateral, positions, risk, fees, private lifecycle, and REST/WS reconciliation before runtime.

contract_product.reason: Current official sources do not expose standard futures, perpetual, or options contract products.

official_sources.evidence: Coinmetro product materials include margin/swap/TRAM-like surfaces, but this adapter only wires spot market data and offline private request specs.

runtime_isolation: Do not route Coinmetro margin, swap, TRAM-like, leverage, collateral, or position semantics through the spot adapter until product scope, credentials, account eligibility, parser fixtures, private order lifecycle, and reconciliation are audited.
required_audit_gaps: margin/swap collateral, position, risk, and fee parser fixtures
private order lifecycle request specs and parsers
